# Premiumfangirls

> Miami-based, full-service creator management and production company for content creators, models, and personalities.

Premiumfangirls manages and produces for creators worldwide on a zero-upfront, performance-based revenue share. The company runs 24/7 management and chatting, complete social media marketing, brand planning and management, in-house content production (videographers, photographers, photoshoots, music videos), podcasts and media, and monetization. Creators do not need to live in Miami. Applicants must be 18 or older.

## Services
- 24/7 management & chatting
- Social media marketing (TikTok, Instagram, Reddit, X, YouTube; organic + paid)
- Brand planning & management
- In-house content production — videographers, photographers, editors, photoshoots, music videos, campaign shoots
- Podcasts & media — The 305 Podcast (featuring Fresh of the Fresh N Fit Podcast) and partnership with the Fresh N Fit Podcast
- Monetization & paywall management

## Key facts
- Location: Miami, FL, USA — operates worldwide and remotely.
- Works with creators, models, musicians, and personalities; helps creators get featured on streams and podcasts.
- Cost to creators: zero upfront; performance-based revenue share only.
- Apply: https://premiumfangirls.com/#apply

## Important pages
- Home: https://premiumfangirls.com/
- Services: https://premiumfangirls.com/#services
- Production: https://premiumfangirls.com/#production
- Podcasts: https://premiumfangirls.com/#podcasts
- Creators / Roster: https://premiumfangirls.com/#creators
- Apply: https://premiumfangirls.com/#apply
